title: If Let Bind
description: Safely extract the value from an optional variable using the optional binding syntax.
problemStatement:
Safe unwrapping! Given an optional variable `middleName` (set to `"Grace"`), use `if let` to print the name. If it is `nil`, don't print anything.

**Requirement:** Do NOT use the forced unwrap operator `!`.
hints: Optional binding `if let` is the safest way to check if an optional contains a value.
